Use ecommerce impressions to construct search events.
Use GA4 schema for Ecommerce Events.

'Data Layer - Cloud Retail' and 'Data Layer - Ecommerce' are considered legacy options and won't be available in new tags.
If possible, we suggest switching to new options (please verify with 'Preview' before deploying). For 'Data Layer - Ecommerce' , switch to 'Data Layer' (this uses GA4 schema if present, otherwise falls back to UA Enhanced Ecommerce.
For 'Data Layer - Cloud Retail', switch to option 'Variable - Cloud Retail' by pointing a 'Data Layer Variable' with key 'cloud_retail' and associating with the 'Variable - Cloud Retail' .

When using a custom cookie prefix, use Tag Sequencing (under Advanced Settings below) to ensure that the corresponding Conversion Linker tag fires before this Google Flight Search tag.

Selected options may affect site performance.
Setting a minimum on-screen duration or configuring the trigger to observe DOM changes requires Google Tag Manager to monitor the status of the selected element(s). When multiple elements on a given page are matched, site performance (after page load) may be affected. For best performance, ensure that your CSS Selector does not match a large number of elements, or use ID as your selection method instead.
The URL identifier that triggers the preview copy of the Canvas object

Note: This tag type is only supported on iOS versions 6 and greater. To prevent firing the tag on Android, add a negative rule such as {{platform}} does not equal iOS. To prevent firing the tag on older versions of iOS, add a negative rule such as {{platform}} equals iOS and {{os version}} matches RegEx ^[0-5]\..+.

🛈 Explicit parameters given a value above may be overridden by parameters given in this table. You can use either way to pass parameters.
🛈 The pagetype parameter is required when you include the prodid parameter.
🛈 The prodid parameter must be given as an Array if multiple values will be passed. Do not use a comma separated string!
🛈 Explicit config above may be overridden by config given in this table. You can use either way to pass config.

🛈 One "UET config / page view" tag is REQUIRED for every page. You must set your tag id (and any other desired config) on the config tag and ensure that it is triggered on every page. No other events will fire on a page unless this tag is triggered, because it contains your specific tag id that is necessary for all events.
🛈 Please see this page for additional information on UET consent mode: https://help.ads.microsoft.com/apex/index/3/en/60119
🛈 The hotel total price (hct_total_price) and currency parameters are required when you include other hotel parameters.

🛈 If you would like to send per-item details in the items array, it must be passed in as a user defined parameter below. We recommend this if possible, but it is an advanced scenario not required for basic remarketing for products.
